achievements.description: Defeat Bowser in the Crimson Carnival and collect the grand star.

achievements.description: Collect all 7 stars in Colorful Pyramid Desert.

achievements.title: First Freezeflame Trials
achievements.description: Collect all 7 stars in Burning Arctic Caverns.

achievements.title: Luminescent Valley
achievements.description: Collect all 7 stars in Cryptic Phosphor Tower.

achievements.title: Mario's Trip in China, but Easier
achievements.description: Collect all 7 stars in Dragon Road Chun-Nan.

achievements.description: Collect all 7 stars in Hang Mystic Mansion.

achievements.description: Collect all 7 stars in The Classic Stage.

achievements.description: Collect all 7 stars in Mountain Above the Clouds.

achievements.title: usernamesarespiders' Detailed Castle
achievements.description: Collect all 7 stars in Vintage Castle.

achievements.title: scuttlebugraiser's Fire Trials
achievements.description: Collect all 7 stars in Temple of Prometheus.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Pie's Seasonal Papercraft
achievements.description: Collect all 7 stars in Autumn Mountain.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Aglab's Scenic Overworlds
achievements.description: Collect all 4 stars across all 3 overworlds.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Small but Significant Sides
achievements.description: Collect all 4 stars across Wing Cap, Metal Cap, and both Bowser courses
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Halls of Fame Silver
achievements.description: Collect 7 stars across the Halls of Fame.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Halls of Fame Gold
achievements.description: Collect all 14 stars across the Halls of Fame.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Another Adventure, Another Pointless Switch
achievements.description: Course 1 - Collect the star 'Wooded Secrets Platforming' without standing on the purple switch.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Rollout Grinding
achievements.description: Course 2 - Collect all the blue coins without using the A button.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: No Wings in This Sky
achievements.description: Course 3 - Collect the star 'Top of the Spinning Tower' without getting a wing cap.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Good Old Tower Climbing
achievements.description: Enter the other Course 4 entrance in the overworld without getting a wing cap (enter any level or switch day/night to retry).
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Another Cannonless Mission
achievements.description: Course 5 - Collect the star 'Get on Yellow Desert Temple Top' without using the cannon.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Keep Your Cool
achievements.description: Course 6 - Collect the star 'Penguin Trapped in Burnt Room' without going below 6 HP.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Phosphor River Race
achievements.description: Course 7 - Collect the star 'Deep Dive in Phosphor River' with at least 5 seconds remaining on the timer.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Coin Collecting with Certain Death
achievements.description: Course 8 - Collect all 8 coins from the arrow over quicksand.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: You're No Fun...
achievements.description: Course 9 - Collect the star 'The Furnace Fun Wannabe' without activating any of the puzzles.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Great View up Here
achievements.description: Guest Course 1 - Stand on top of the roof of the Whomps' fortress (the highest point of the second area).
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Bypassing the Slopes
achievements.description: Guest Course 2 - Collect the star 'Slide-Slide for the Star' without butt sliding.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Let's Give Those Rabbits Glasses!
achievements.description: Guest Course 3 - Collect the star 'All Hail King Carrot' without taking damage in the King Carrot area.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: I Still Don't Need Your Gimmick
achievements.description: Guest Course 4 - Collect the star 'Zeus's Domain' without jump kicking.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Not Really a Speedrun nor Water
achievements.description: Guest Course 5 - Collect the star 'A Speedrun Over the Water without standing on the purple switch.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Acrobatic Flier Redux
achievements.description: Wing Cap Stage - Begin your flight from the switch platform and directly collect the star without touching the ground.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: To the Moon, Again
achievements.description: Cosmic Wall - Jump too high into the air and hear some fitting music as you Game Over.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Keep Your Cool, Again
achievements.description: ToasterKetchup's Level - Collect the star 'Slippery Snow' without taking damage.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Another Bullet Hell
achievements.description: Defeat the final Bowser on Gamer Mode with at least half HP remaining (must talk to Bowser).
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Always Ends With Dorrie
achievements.description: Mash many buttons during the credits to spawn a friend (see Measured for progress).
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Familiar Structure
achievements.description: Course 1 - Collect a 1-up mushroom on top of some scaffolding.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Sure is a Secret, Alright
achievements.description: Course 1 - Collect a 1-up mushroom near a big tree.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Not a Satisfying Sound
achievements.description: Course 3 - Collect a 1-up mushroom outside, beside the broken tower.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Like a Record, Baby
achievements.description: Course 3 - Collect a 1-up mushroom at the very top of the rotating mill.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Good Collision, for Sure
achievements.description: Course 5 - Collect a 1-up mushroom at the top of a waterfall.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Maybe, Maybe
achievements.description: Course 7 - Collect a 1-up mushroom inside the dark wood room.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: A Wet Life
achievements.description: Course 8 - Collect a 1-up mushroom inside a waterfall.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Ridiculous Collectible
achievements.description: Course 9 - Collect a 1-up mushroom high up, between some inverted platforms.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: It's Okay, I Guess
achievements.description: Guest Course 1 - Collect a 1-up mushroom inside a small pentagon pillar.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Reference to Someone
achievements.description: Guest Course 2 - Collect a 1-up mushroom above a waterfall.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: The Real Secret
achievements.description: Guest Course 3 - Collect a 1-up mushroom between some bookshelves.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: It's Clean, Right?
achievements.description: Guest Course 3 - Collect a 1-up mushroom inside one of the castle rooms.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Pole Climbing, That's How
achievements.description: Guest Course 3 - Collect a 1-up mushroom high up in the ice cavern.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: No BLJ's Required, Really
achievements.description: Guest Course 4 - Collect a 1-up mushroom somewhere inside Zeus's domain.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: The Broken Floor
achievements.description: Guest Course 5 - Collect a 1-up mushroom under a small staircase.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Got Health?
achievements.description: Metal Cap Stage - Collect a 1-up mushroom on top of a lavafall.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Safety Warp for the Crossovers
achievements.description: Bowser in the Ice Mines - Collect a 1-up mushroom at the bottom of a slide.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Some Nerfed Slopes
achievements.description: Bowser in the Crimson Carnival - Collect a 1-up mushroom around a tall building.

achievements.title: Not the Only Sonic Reference
achievements.description: Bowser in the Crimson Carnival - Collect a 1-up mushroom on top of the buildings in the center.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: The Hack Creator Likes Sonic, Alright
achievements.description: The Halls of Fame - Collect a 1-up mushroom above the arches of the hall.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: This Doorway Doesn't Work
achievements.description: SEGA's level - Collect a 1-up mushroom near the starting point.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Creator's Design Choice, That's Why
achievements.description: Cheezepin's level - Collect a 1-up mushroom on top of a tree.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: The Way Physics Work
achievements.description: Kaze's level - Collect a 1-up mushroom under the starting point.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Strain-Free Tunnel
achievements.description: Overworld 1 - Collect a 1-up mushroom in an underwater alcove.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: It's Pretty Cool, Right?
achievements.description: Overworld 2 Ice - Collect a 1-up mushroom off in the distance, behind the temple of Prometheus.
